# Webapp Scaffold Setup

This Pack has no infrastructure setup. It installs application source and a
basic CI workflow.

1. Preview and apply the Pack.
2. Replace the sample application behavior.
3. Install dependencies and run backend, frontend, and end-to-end tests.
4. Record the project's real commands and policies in Yoke.
5. Select other Packs only for capabilities the project actually needs.

For application ownership and update behavior, read customization.md. For the
installed code layout and local commands, read development.md.

Infrastructure, credentials, deployment environments, backups, recovery,
domains, and production verification are intentional project-specific gaps;
complete them through the selected capability Packs and project-owned runbooks.
